command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'transactions'
AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('sellerName','saleChannel','taxBase','taxAmount','reavMargin','fiscalRegime_tx','tpvSaleId','reservationId_tx','invoiceNumber','reservationRef','operationStatus');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME
sellerName
saleChannel
taxBase
taxAmount
reavMargin
tpvSaleId
invoiceNumber
reservationRef
operationStatus
